yeah, and she prolly pairs better with other damage dealers; Vort can space out her setup cards (Charge, Reload), so Karen's exalt doesn't seem needed for Vort's burst the way she would likely benefit other DDs who wanna spam more cards (e.g. Kath, one of the current banner limiteds <:kath_cool:1447714576413233315>)

Hello, contrary to popular belief, vorticr isnt exactly an exalt spammer.

You can put Sanga, Celeste, ogier in your comp.

Use vortice posse on Sanga. If Sanga exalt is filled, white stance sanga exalt (FOR MOBS ONLY) and you clear mobs.

During boss fights, you want to focus on spamming your posse pursuit and reloads.

Switch out these wheels.

Sanga - elevated focus + analysis of death

Ogier & Celeste - Aged (R), Whisper (R), Gluttony (R)

Vorticr - any realm mastery wheels
